description_long: This is a small, light airplane with a high-mounted straight wing configuration and a T-tail design. The fuselage is slender and streamlined, with a single enclosed cockpit located at the front, featuring a clear canopy. The wings are long and narrow, with red-tipped ends and subtle green and red striping near the tips. The landing gear appears to be fixed, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels under the fuselage. The overall color scheme is a pale beige or off-white, with metallic and glass elements visible in the cockpit and landing gear.
description: A compact, high-wing airplane with a T-tail, red-tipped wings, and a single enclosed cockpit at the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high-mounted wing, T-tail, and clear cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow fuselage, wide wingspan, and red-tipped wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the high wing and T-tail, with cockpit details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the T-tail structure and the full wingspan with colored tips.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with slight dihedral and red-tipped ends; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: No visible engine present on the airframe.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle fixed landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat enclosed cockpit with a clear canopy.
